result:
Here's a summary of all the changes made to remove the compact layout filter from the Posts UI:

## Files Deleted (3)
- `WordPress/src/main/res/layout/post_list_item_compact.xml` - Compact post list item layout
- `WordPress/src/main/res/layout/post_list_item_skeleton_compact.xml` - Compact skeleton loading layout
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/posts/PostListViewLayoutType.kt` - Enum defining STANDARD/COMPACT layout types

## Files Deleted (Drawables) (2)
- `WordPress/src/main/res/drawable/ic_view_post_compact_white_24dp.xml` - Compact view icon
- `WordPress/src/main/res/drawable/ic_view_post_full_white_24dp.xml` - Full view icon

## Files Modified (10)

1. **`PostListMainViewModel.kt`** - Removed `_viewLayoutType`, `_viewLayoutTypeMenuUiState` LiveData fields, `toggleViewLayout()`, `setViewLayoutAndIcon()`, `setUserPreferredViewLayoutType()` methods, and layout switching calls from `onSearchExpanded()`/`onSearchCollapsed()`/`start()`

2. **`PostListMainViewState.kt`** - Removed entire `PostListViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState` sealed class (with `StandardViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState` and `CompactViewLayoutTypeMenuUiState`)

3. **`PostListFragment.kt`** - Removed `viewLayoutType` observer that toggled item decorations and adapter layout type, removed compact item decoration, and now always applies the standard decoration

4. **`PostListItemViewHolder.kt`** - Removed the `Compact` inner class view holder

5. **`PostListAdapter.kt`** - Removed `VIEW_TYPE_POST_COMPACT`/`VIEW_TYPE_LOADING_COMPACT` view types, removed `itemLayoutType` field, simplified `getItemViewType()` and `onCreateViewHolder()`, removed `updateItemLayoutType()` method

6. **`PostListItemType.kt`** - Removed `compactActions` parameter from `PostListItemUiState`

7. **`PostListItemUiStateHelper.kt`** - Removed `createCompactViewActions()` method and its usage

8. **`AppPrefsWrapper.kt`** - Removed `postListViewLayoutType` property

9. **`AppPrefs.java`** - Removed `getPostsListViewLayoutType()` and `setPostsListViewLayoutType()` methods

10. **`AnalyticsUtils.java`** - Removed `trackAnalyticsPostListToggleLayout()` method

11. **`values/strings.xml`** - Removed `post_list_toggle_item_layout_cards_view` and `post_list_toggle_item_layout_list_view` strings

12. **`values/dimens.xml`** - Removed compact-specific dimensions (`post_list_content_margin_compact`, `post_list_more_button_extra_padding`, `posts_list_compact_row_height`, `posts_list_compact_image_size`, `posts_list_compact_menu_button_size`)
